explanation: The LTL formula captures the requirement that whenever the pilot is in control (standby is True), the autopilot will eventually transition from NOMINAL to STANDBY. It uses the until operator (U) to express that the autopilot will remain in the NOMINAL state until standby becomes True, and then it will transition to the STANDBY state. The chosen template ensures that the transition happens within a fixed duration.
chosen_LTL_template: (((! (bool_exp1 & (X (! bool_exp1)))) U ((bool_exp1 & (X (! bool_exp1))) & (X ((G[0,N_DURATION] bool_exp3) | (G bool_exp3))))) | (G (! (bool_exp1 & (X (! bool_exp1))))))
